def build_report(items: list[dict]) -> str:
    result = ""
    for item in items:
        result += f"id={item['id']} name={item['name']}\n"
    return result


def concatenate_log_entries(entries: list[str]) -> str:
    log = ""
    for entry in entries:
        log += "[LOG] " + entry + "\n"
    return log


def build_sql_values(rows: list[tuple]) -> str:
    values = ""
    for row in rows:
        values += f"({row[0]}, '{row[1]}'),"
    return values.rstrip(",")
